title: Cleistes monantha
taxonomy: Cleistes monantha is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family, commonly known as the orchid family, consists of a vast and diverse group of flowering plants. The genus Cleistes is part of the subfamily Vanilloideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies within the Orchidaceae family. The subfamily Vanilloideae includes approximately 1,200 species, with Cleistes monantha being one of them. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships between different plant species within the orchid family.

intro: Cleistes monantha, commonly known as the single-flowered Cleistes, is a species of orchid native to Brazil. The health benefits of Cleistes monantha include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds and infections.
